presentationConstraints.summary: Use semantic structure so the primary surface is legible before enhancement.

Keep the artifact self-contained and renderable without external runtime assumptions.

motionPlan: Reveal sections in narrative order instead of animating every element equally.

Evidence surfaces show distinct visual families rather than duplicated shells.
Interactive affordances remain visible and coherent on both desktop and narrow widths.
responsiveLayoutRules: Preserve one readable primary column on narrow viewports.
Collapse side-by-side evidence into stacked sections without dropping shared detail.

contentGoals.summary: Orient the user to our quarterly performance immediately.
Explain the core ideas behind our quarterly performance.
Summarize our quarterly performance clearly and with grounded evidence.

evidenceGoals.summary: Keep one grounded evidence surface visible on first paint.
Support the document with grounded evidence and explicit takeaways.

presentationConstraints.summary: Use semantic structure so the primary surface is legible before enhancement.
Populate the first paint with meaningful content rather than empty shells.
Keep the artifact self-contained and renderable without external runtime assumptions.

skillNeeds.rationale: Persistent artifacts must keep keyboard, labeling, and readable structure obligations explicit.
Dense concept coverage benefits from a stronger narrative and section hierarchy spine.

skillDiscoveryResolution.rationale: Studio checked the published runtime guidance corpus for this request but did not find a qualifying skill to attach before authoring.
skillDiscoveryResolution.failureReason: No qualifying published runtime guidance matched the request's current skill needs.

blueprint.narrativeArc: Orient the user, stage the core concepts, surface evidence, and close with a request-faithful takeaway for summarize our quarterly performance.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: Open with a clear title and compact summary.
firstPaintRequirements: Show the title and summary immediately on first paint.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: Make the request-grounded concepts easy to scan.
firstPaintRequirements: Render clearly segmented bullets, headings, or subsections instead of one uninterrupted paragraph.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: Back the summary with grounded evidence or examples.
firstPaintRequirements: Surface labeled evidence, examples, or explanatory notes inside the document body.

sectionPlan.visiblePurpose: End with a takeaway or next-step framing.
contentRequirements: Close with a concrete implication, risk, or next step.
firstPaintRequirements: End with a visible closing section rather than an abrupt stop.

evidencePlan.purpose: Ground the document with labeled examples, evidence, or explicit takeaways.
Leave the document with a clearly surfaced concluding signal.

obligations: Use semantic headings and preserve a readable document outline.
Keep bullets, tables, and callouts legible without relying on interaction.
ariaExpectations: Lists and supporting callouts stay readable in export and preview.

blueprint.variationStrategy: Preserve the scaffold family while varying composition through concept emphasis, evidence ordering, and motion restraint.

skillNeeds.rationale: Persistent artifacts must keep keyboard, labeling, and readable structure obligations explicit.
Dense concept coverage benefits from a stronger narrative and section hierarchy spine.

semanticStructure.label: A our quarterly performance document
Open with a clear title and compact summary.
Make the request-grounded concepts easy to scan.
Back the summary with grounded evidence or examples.
End with a takeaway or next-step framing.
bindings: Close with a concrete implication, risk, or next step.

motionPlan: Reveal sections in narrative order instead of animating every element equally.
accessibilityObligations: Use semantic headings and preserve a readable document outline.
Keep bullets, tables, and callouts legible without relying on interaction.
responsiveLayoutRules: Preserve one readable primary column on narrow viewports.
Collapse side-by-side evidence into stacked sections without dropping shared detail.
staticAuditExpectations: Render at least 1 sections with semantic wrappers.
Keep first-paint evidence populated before scripts execute.
renderEvalChecklist: Hero, primary evidence, and detail region remain readable at first paint.
Evidence surfaces show distinct visual families rather than duplicated shells.
Interactive affordances remain visible and coherent on both desktop and narrow widths.
